evidence: named-conjecture card: erdos_672 = CLOSED (BBGH 2006 Proc London Math Soc 92 Thm 1.1 (4 ≤ k ≤ 11 no perfect power) + HTT 2009 Publ Math Debrecen 74 Thm 2.1 (cubes k<39 b=1 only n<0 exceptions) + GHP 2009 Compositio 145 Thm 1.1 (3<k<35) — all unconditional; (k=4 ℓ=3) closed since 2006)
